base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of black_belt_master — a character from 1987 final fantasy. Black Belt + Master class-change — bare-fist monk. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Black Belt + Master class-change — bare-fist monk
